disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New profound confusion and disorientation developing over the last 12 hours in a resident with known long-standing kidney failure
trigger_question_examples: How is their thinking and alertness compared to normal?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They've become really muddled and disoriented in just the last 12 hours — they don't know where they are and can't hold a conversation.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Intractable vomiting with a depressed conscious state — aspiration/airway risk
trigger_question_examples: Are they able to keep anything down?
Are they alert enough to protect against choking when they vomit?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They can't stop vomiting and they're so drowsy we're worried they'll choke on it — the anti-sickness medicine isn't working.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe volume overload with breathlessness at rest — swelling and fast breathing
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Their legs are hugely swollen and weeping, and they're breathing fast and short of breath even lying in bed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Diuretics producing no urine output — established anuria despite usual medication
trigger_question_examples: Are the fluid tablets still working?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The water tablets have stopped doing anything — they're not passing any urine at all now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Urine-like odour on the breath reported by staff
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed anything unusual about their breath?
Does their breath have any particular smell?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Their breath smells strongly of urine — we all noticed it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Generalised intense itching with excoriation, anorexia and a month of weight loss
trigger_question_examples: Have they been itchy or off their food lately?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They've been itching all over and scratching themselves raw, not eating, and they've lost a lot of weight this past month.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: High blood pressure reading and fast pulse on the facility monitor
trigger_question_examples: Have the staff taken a blood pressure and pulse?
What were the latest observations on the facility monitor?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The blood pressure was very high on our cuff — 195 over 110 — and the pulse is around 105.
